title: M.Phil / Ph.D Jobs 2026 – Project Research Scientist I
shortInfo: Madurai Kamaraj University Recruitment 2026: Madurai Kamaraj University has announced recruitment for 1 Project Research Scientist I vacancy. Eligible candidates with MSc/PhD qualifications in Life Sciences can apply online on or before 10 June 2026.

basic_details.job_title: Madurai Kamaraj University Project Research Scientist Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Madurai Kamaraj University Recruitment 2026: Madurai Kamaraj University has announced recruitment for 1 Project Research Scientist I vacancy. Eligible candidates with MSc/PhD qualifications in Life Sciences can apply online on or before 10 June 2026.

qualification.details: MSc/PhD degree in life sciences with experience in handling human clinical samples, biochemical assays, flow cytometry and analysis, and cell-based assays.

salary_details.pay_scale: As per the ICMR norms including 20% HRA
salary_details.salary: As per the ICMR norms including 20% HRA

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 10-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Madurai Kamaraj University to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the Madurai Kamaraj University recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the Project Research Scientist-I (Non-Medical) position is 10th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: What is the total number of vacancies announced?
faq.answer: Madurai Kamaraj University has announced a total of 1 vacancy for the post of Project Research Scientist-I (Non-Medical) in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: What are the educational qualifications required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MSc/PhD degree in life sciences. Additionally, experience in handling human clinical samples, biochemical assays, flow cytometry and analysis, and cell-based assays is required.

faq.question: What is the salary offered for the Project Research Scientist-I (Non-Medical) position?
faq.answer: The salary for this post will be as per the ICMR norms, which includes a 20% House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is entirely online. Candidates need to fill out and submit their applications through the official website.

faq.question: What is the selection process for the Project Research Scientist-I (Non-Medical) role?
faq.answer: The selection process for this position will primarily involve an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Where is the Madurai Kamaraj University located?
faq.answer: Madurai Kamaraj University is located in Madurai, Tamil Nadu.

faq.question: Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: This is a contract-based job. The position is for a Project Research Scientist-I (Non-Medical) on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification and the online application link will be available in the "Important Links" section of this article. Please check there for direct access.

seo_tags: Madurai Kamaraj University Project Research Scientist-I (Non-Medical) Recruitment 2026
